> east

> get bucket

> south

> south

> up

> east

> east

# You tie the rope securely to the parapets!
> tie rope to parapets
# You climb down the rope. Lower Tower You are in the Lower Tower. Obvious
#   exits are: North Up
> down

> north

> get holywater

> in

> hit wall with hammer

## Secret Passage

> north

## Torture Chamber

> west
> drop cheese

# A rat scurries about -- a key is in its mouth!. A key is in its mouth!
> examine rat
# The rat takes the cheese and drops the key. You got the key!
> take key

## Secret Passage

> east

## Underground Lake Chamber

> north

# You climb into the boat. Aboard the Boat You are aboard a small boat on an
#   underground lake. Obvious exits are: East
> enter boat
# You row across the underground lake... Gallery You are in the Gallery.
> row
> drop crate
> drop oil

# You stand on the crate and climb up to the overhang. Overhang You are on an
#   Overhang high above the Gallery. Obvious exits are: Down
> up
# Using the hammer, you pry the nails loose. The tapestry is loose!
> take nails

> down
> drop hammer
> drop nails

# AHA! A hole in the wall is revealed behind the tapestry!
> take tapestry
> drop tapestry

# Pick up the oil
> take oil

> north

> oil door

> attack coffin
